<!--
Thanks for contributing to Claudicator! Please fill this in so reviews go quickly.
Keep PRs focused — one logical change per pull request.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12. For anything beyond a small fix, please open an issue first. -->

## How I tested it

<!-- How did you verify this works? e.g. "Built and ran in Xcode, watched the
gauge go amber at 85%, confirmed the countdown ticks down." -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The app builds and runs in Xcode (`⌘R`).
- [ ] I manually exercised the code path I changed.
- [ ] The diff is focused on a single logical change.
- [ ] No analytics, telemetry, or data leaves the user's Mac.
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or I've explained why one is needed).
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if this is user-facing.
- [ ] I updated docs / `README.md` if behavior or setup changed.

## Screenshots

<!-- Optional, but very welcome for any UI change. -->
